title: galaction sericeum
intro: Galaction sericeum, also known as Galactorrhoea or Goat's Rue, is a perennial herb belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, Galaction sericeum has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Galaction sericeum are attributed to its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS), as well as its potential to support lactation in breastfeeding women. Galaction sericeum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized in various herbal preparations.
